# NIP-94 Reference Card

NIP-94 uses kind:1063 for file metadata. Required tags: url, m, x, ox, content. Optional tags: size, dim, magnet, i, blurhash, thumb, image, summary, alt, fallback, service. Filter pattern: kind:1063. JSON example: {"kind": 1063, "tags": [["url","uri"], ["m","mime"], ["x","hash"], ["ox","hash"]], "content": "caption"}.
